baseline_no_context<TAB>2<TAB>3<TAB>4<TAB>3<TAB>The response is somewhat relevant but lacks contextual understanding, consistent with the persona to an extent, and natural in tone; overall quality could be improved by adding more specificity. Short note: Needs improvement on providing appropriate

A response that acknowledges protocol but is too neutral and lacks urgency or suspicion fitting for a Gatekeeper persona in this context. It could be more natural if it showed some concern over the situation, given as an old guard might feel protective of their domain's security.
